home.subtitle: Your quiet witness
home.getting_started_desc: Tap the Record tab to start collecting audio evidence. All recordings are automatically encrypted and backed up.
home.hero_tagline: Record it. Lock it. Prove it.
home.always_saved_desc: Your evidence is backed up instantly — even if your phone breaks
home.cant_be_changed_desc: No one can edit or fake your recordings — not even you

record.title: Record
record.transcript_hint: Transcript will appear here during recording...

evidence.title: Evidence Vault
evidence.no_yet_desc: Your recordings, photos, and notes will appear here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.shake_desc: Shake your phone 3 times to start recording instantly
